title: Mohi Competitive Positioning Statement
summary: Mohi Competitive Positioning Statement  The category Mohi creates  Mohi is a frugal, standards-first "live + resumable" web framework: server-driven UI with real-time updates, without hydration, and with first-class governance for performance, portability, security, and scale.  It is not another React meta-framework. It is a new operating model for building web systems: one source of truth, one render loop, one measurable budget, deployable anywhere.
